subcodes.title: Words to Helen Goodall and Ella Cooper spoken on 1908-01-11
subcodes.first_line: That is very good, that is right for that brings harmony into the meeting. ...the Hidden Words should be read, and often the Tajalleyat
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @law of repetition; recitation of the Greatest Name, @unity; oneness of humanity
